title: Translucent Glass Border
description: Adjusts the translucency of glass borders to be consistent with stained glass with connected textures.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Translucent Glass Border** makes the borders of regular glass the same translucency as stained glass.

![Optional](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a868b69f3fcafea77190464ed6cba5ded63d8581_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Connected Textures</summary>

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d0214491541324085aa8655b2a50805de77ef17.png)


</details>

somehow works in older versions too
